creator: doctorwhoguy@gmail.com
text: I also encounter this same error (at least I think it's the same error). It manifests at seemingly random times upon starting OBS or when changing settings for video devices such as my EVGA capture card or my webcam. I reported it upstream, but it was closed because FreeBSD isn't officially supported. The most obvious symptom I see is that the output from the capture card or webcam will just be a solid green screen. Restarting OBS once or twice usually results in the video source working correctly. It is still present in the current 29.1.3 release of OBS.
